raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Speaker Robert Rivas partnered with VSP Vision Eyes of Hope to provide free eye exams and eyewear for young students at El Sausal Middle School in Salinas.",
    "El Sausal Middle School was the first of a three-stop tour to provide approximately 275 adults and children in the Salinas, Gilroy and Watsonville communities with free eye exams and free prescription glasses.",
    "Students at El Sausal Middle School received comprehensive exams by volunteer optometrists.",
    "The event included a mobile clinic where prescription glasses are made on-board, allowing many patients to receive their glasses the same day.",
    "Eye care and annual eye exams are key components to a person's overall health and wellbeing.",
    "Eye health and clear vision directly correlate to a person's education, employment, overall health, quality of life, and much more.",
    "Many students at El Sausal Middle School come from rural and low-income families, who often lack access to adequate and affordable vision and health care.",
    "Regular eye exams are key components of a student's overall health and well-being.",
    "VSP Eyes of Hope helps to provide equitable access to eye care and eyewear where it's needed most, across the country.",
    "VSP Eyes of Hope has provided no-cost eye care and eyewear to more than 4 million people in need."
  ]
}
```
